name: Watch (Video Ingestion)
description_en: Give Claude a video input: download from YouTube, Instagram, X, Vimeo, TikTok, or any of ~1800 yt-dlp sites (or a local file), extract auto-scaled frames with ffmpeg, and pull a timestamped transcript from captions or on-device whisper—then answer questions about it.
description_zh: 给 Claude 一个视频输入:从 YouTube、Instagram、X、Vimeo、TikTok 或 yt-dlp 支持的约 1800 个站点(或本地文件)下载,用 ffmpeg 抽取自适应缩放的帧,并从字幕或本地 whisper 取得带时间戳的转写——然后回答与视频内容相关的问题。
long_en: Chains yt-dlp, ffmpeg, and a local mlx-whisper fallback into one pipeline so the agent can reason over both frames and transcript without any API key.
long_zh: 把 yt-dlp、ffmpeg 与本地 mlx-whisper 回退串成一条流水线,让 agent 无需任何 API key 即可结合画面帧与转写进行推理。
sec_note_en: Downloads third-party video locally via yt-dlp—respect copyright and platform Terms of Service. Transcription runs on-device (no API key); a fork of bradautomates/claude-video.
sec_note_zh: 通过 yt-dlp 把第三方视频下载到本地——请遵守版权与平台服务条款。转写在本机运行(无需 API key);本仓库为 bradautomates/claude-video 的 fork。
